name: 近7天资金流水
scenarioDescription: 查询最近7天 fund_flow 跨系统资金流水账务记录，按创建时间倒序
sqlBody:
SELECT business_id, amount, in_ex_type, settlement_type_code, gmt_create
FROM fund_flow
WHERE gmt_create >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

name: 业务员派费收入
scenarioDescription: 查询指定业务员的派费（COURIER_DELIVERY_FEE）结算订单金额汇总；order_type 仅属 hst_order
sqlBody:
SELECT c.staff_code, c.name, SUM(o.order_amount) AS delivery_fee_income
FROM hst_order o
JOIN nl_courier c ON o.object_code = c.staff_code
WHERE o.order_type = 'COURIER_DELIVERY_FEE'
  AND c.staff_code = {{staff_code}}
GROUP BY c.staff_code, c.name
